observations: All optional SaaS SDKs (Sentry, Langfuse, Svix, Slack, Composio, Mastra) now use dynamic imports so they are never loaded at module level when their env vars are empty.
Sentry: @sentry/node dynamically imported; initSentry() and captureException() are async and return immediately when SENTRY_DSN is unset.
Langfuse: Already gated via observability-factory.ts — noop tracer/metric recorder when LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY/SECRET_KEY absent.
Svix: New OutboundWebhookService dispatches via Svix SDK when SVIX_API_KEY is set, or falls back to direct fetch POST without retry library.
Slack: @slack/web-api dynamically imported per-call in slack routes and notification subscriber; module never loaded at import time.
Composio: @composio/core dynamically imported; getComposioClient() returns Promise<null> when COMPOSIO_API_KEY empty.
Mastra: MastraAgentRunner dynamically imported in investigation-worker.ts only when MASTRA_ENABLED=true.
Slack routes return 'Slack not configured' sentinel (400) when env vars are empty.
Composio tool provider returns empty tool list when API key absent.
Mastra agent runner is never loaded when MASTRA_ENABLED=false.
All 1070 unit tests pass. TypeScript compilation clean.
